Video.summary: Chris tests a new welder on Project Spartan's roll cage while Eric inspects the motor.
Video.title: The Kaiser Gets a Roll Cage

Image.alt: The Kaiser Gets a Roll Cage
The Kaiser Gets a Roll Cage
The Kaiser Gets a Roll Cage

Video.summary: Chris and Eric battle the truly insane rust in Project Spartan's '69 M715 Kaiser Jeep cab.
Video.title: Our 1960s Jeep is a Rust Bucket

Image.alt: Our 1960s Jeep is a Rust Bucket
Our 1960s Jeep is a Rust Bucket
Our 1960s Jeep is a Rust Bucket

Video.summary: Chris and Eric are tackling Project Spartan axles and turbocharging the Polaris UTV for off-road adventures.
Video.title: Axles, Tires and Turbo, Oh My!

Image.alt: Axles, Tires and Turbo, Oh My!
Axles, Tires and Turbo, Oh My!
Axles, Tires and Turbo, Oh My!

Video.summary: The guys start converting a Toyota 4Runner into a self-sustaining off road expedition vehicle.
Video.title: Overlanding Yota Part 1: Suspension Upgrades

Video.summary: Heavy duty bumpers and rock sliders help protect the Overlanding Toyota 4Runner on the trails.
Video.title: Overlanding Yota Part 2: Bumper Fabrication

Video.summary: We add a winch, roof top tent, LED lights, and more to our 2016 Toyota 4Runner Overlanding Project.
Video.title: Overlanding Yota Part 3: Necessary Accessories

Video.summary: Our Overlanding 4Runner gets new exhaust and creature comforts to help while exploring the wild.
Video.title: Overlanding Yota Part 4: Time for Adventure

Image.alt: Overlanding Yota Part 4: Time for Adventure
Overlanding Yota Part 4: Time for Adventure
Overlanding Yota Part 4: Time for Adventure

Video.summary: Our 1969 Jeep M715 Project Spartan is getting a frame-up overhaul to look like a truck again.
Video.title: Lighting the Way Forward

Video.summary: Dig's Rod Shop unveils a '47 Chevy pickup: a "Zey Bronze" stunner with 640hp and unique barn wood details.
Video.title: Digs Rod Shop - 1947 Chevy 3100

Video.summary: Shane Lile's purple-over-red '55 Chevy Bel Air Gasser: an eye-popping, custom drag strip beast!
Video.title: Shane Lile - Gasshole

Video.summary: We're finishing our 427ci LSx engine for Music City Trucks' C10, adding EFI and dyno-tuning it.
Video.title: 427ci LSx Part 2

Video.summary: We're twin-turboing our 600+ HP 427ci Small Block Chevy with new EFI, pushing "Baby Blue" to the limit!
Video.title: Twins for the Win

Video.summary: We fabricate a new cross member, mounting brackets, and install the transfer case on our 1969 Jeep Kaiser.
Video.title: Assembling Our Base

Video.summary: From freeway to farmyard, this rugged straight six was everywhere! It’s the subject of our latest build.
Video.title: Ford 300 Inline Six

Video.summary: Even after 45 years, our antique Ford engine still runs.
Video.title: A Fine Inline Six

Video.summary: The six-cylinder Ford’s numbers keep climbing as we give it major cam, piston, and cylinder head upgrades.
Video.title: Ford’s Big Buzzin’ Half Dozen

Video.summary: Our famous Ford 300 comes home to the Engine Power shop for even BIGGER POWER upgrades.
Video.title: Ultimate Ford 300 Turbo Build - Part 1

Video.summary: Our Turbo Ford 300 dream build continues, assembling for big dyno power!
Video.title: Ultimate Ford 300 Turbo Build - Part 2

Video.summary: Our Turbo Ford 300 returns for dyno showdown: naturally aspirated vs. boosted!
Video.title: Ultimate Ford 300 Turbo Build - Part 3

Video.summary: Dirt & Trails kicks off with a 1987 Land Cruiser and a 1994 F-150, affectionately named Project Leadfoot.
Video.title: Welcome to Dirt and Trails

Video.summary: Project Leadfoot gets a new roll cage, then upgrades to the lift, suspension, steering and brakes.
Video.title: Project Leadfoot Gets A Lift Kit

Image.alt: Project Leadfoot Gets A Lift Kit
Project Leadfoot Gets A Lift Kit
Project Leadfoot Gets A Lift Kit

Video.summary: Chris and Eric install a 600hp Ford 460 Big Block and Tremec TR4050 into Project Leadfoot.
Video.title: Project Leadfoot Gets a New Heart

Image.alt: Project Leadfoot Gets a New Heart
Project Leadfoot Gets a New Heart
Project Leadfoot Gets a New Heart

Video.summary: Eric and Chris overhaul Project Leadfoot's gauges, build transfer case bracing, and wire it up.
Video.title: Gauges, Wiring, and Welding Galore!

Video.summary: Eric measures Leadfoot's driveshafts; Chris preps the 600hp F-150 with new intake, exhaust, and fuel.
Video.title: Exhausting Exhaust Systems

Video.summary: Our '94 Ford F-150 Leadfoot goes from pickup to beast with crazy mods, a trail shakedown, and a Bigfoot cameo.
Video.title: Project Leadfoot is Complete

Video.summary: Out of the shop and into the yard! We take a weekend to rebuild a 350ci small block Chevy V8.
Video.title: Backyard Engine Build

Video.summary: We take the 350ci Small Block Chevy built in the parking lot and upgrade short block assembly.
Video.title: Backyard Build Upgrades

Video.summary: We finish our 350 Small Block Chevy with high-performance induction, then put it to the test.
Video.title: Dyno Testing the Upgraded Backyard Build

Image.alt: Dyno Testing the Upgraded Backyard Build
Dyno Testing the Upgraded Backyard Build
Dyno Testing the Upgraded Backyard Build

Video.summary: A '78 Postal Jeep gets a second chance.
Video.title: Special Delivery

Video.summary: Our '78 Postal Jeep gets an upgraded suspension that can handle the trails.
Video.title: Junk Mail Suspension

Video.summary: The Carcass Duo find a left for dead tow truck that they want to give a new life through fabrication
Video.title: Junkyard Tow Truck

Video.summary: A 50 year old tow truck gets a newly fabricated rear chassis to return it to its former glory.
Video.title: Crippling Rust Repair

Video.summary: We pump up the power on our Junkyard Find Tow Truck.
Video.title: Filling the Void

Video.summary: An interior dress-up for a 50 year old tow truck giving it new life on the road.
Video.title: The Patina Polish

Video.summary: What started as a simple “aerosol overhaul” gets more complicated!
Video.title: AMC-Powered Postal Jeep

Video.summary: Today we’ll show you the 5 most common reasons your engine won’t start...and how to fix it!
Video.title: Top 5 Reasons Why Your Engine Won’t Start

Image.alt: Top 5 Reasons Why Your Engine Won’t Start
Top 5 Reasons Why Your Engine Won’t Start
Top 5 Reasons Why Your Engine Won’t Start

Video.summary: We tear down Project Spartan to rebuild it, but its surprisingly strong engine changes our plans.
Video.title: Kaiser Jeep Chaos

Video.summary: Our 1969 Project Spartan Jeep gets custom exhaust, rear suspension, and body mounts.
Video.title: Rear Suspension Throwdown

Video.summary: Building a big block bow tie classic on a shoestring budget.
Video.title: 454 Budget Build

Video.summary: Our Small Block Chevy cracked during a cold snap. So we’re going to put the guts in a bigger block.
Video.title: Compression Obsession: A Bigger Block

Video.summary: Pat & Frankie upgrade internal components to make our blue oval beast more durable under boost.
Video.title: Beefing Up Our 460 Big Block Ford

Image.alt: Beefing Up Our 460 Big Block Ford
Beefing Up Our 460 Big Block Ford
Beefing Up Our 460 Big Block Ford

Video.summary: Engine Power embarks on a new project for SCCA’s inaugural SPEC Mustang class.
Video.title: SCCA SPEC Mustang Part 1

Video.summary: Our SPEC Mustang Project is back for final touches, as we get it ready to hit the track.
Video.title: SCCA SPEC Mustang Part 2

Video.summary: We turbocharge a bone stock Big Block Ford on the cheap.
Video.title: Boosting a Stock 460ci Big Block Ford

Image.alt: Boosting a Stock 460ci Big Block Ford
Boosting a Stock 460ci Big Block Ford
Boosting a Stock 460ci Big Block Ford

Video.summary: Take a last ride in our Cadillac Hearse. Waking the dead, has never been this much fun!
Video.title: Hearse Overtaker

Video.summary: Chevy vs. Ford in a horsepower battle of the big blocks.
Video.title: 454 Power Build

Video.summary: Making a modern day muscle car with 454-powered 1985 Monte Carlo.
Video.title: 454 meet '85 Monte Carlo

Video.summary: We bring in an old 1984 Chevrolet Land Yacht to give it some custom touches for some family fun.
Video.title: Cruisin' Caprice Wagon

Video.summary: The Caprice Wagon is back in the shop for the rest of its upgrades.
Video.title: Crusin' Caprice Wagon Drivetrain Upgrade

Video.summary: Ian tears down and refreshes a junkyard 5.7L Hemi for his '68 military Kaiser Jeep off-road rat rod
Video.title: Lock Jaw: Hemi

Video.summary: Ian wraps up his junkyard military Jeep fabricating a custom stainless exhaust and plumbing the fuel system
Video.title: Lock Jaw: Final Prep

Video.summary: Ian bullet-proofs his rusted out M715 Jeep building the ultimate driver cage using a high tech tubing bender
Video.title: Lock Jaw: Cage Fight

Video.summary: Ian finishes his Kaiser 4WD just in time to baptize the junkyard recovery Jeep on the red rocks of Moab, Utah
Video.title: Lock Jaw: Moab or Bust
